# OpenClaw Equipment — llms.txt
# https://openclaw.equipment

> OpenClaw Equipment is a package registry and tool marketplace for AI agents.
> Agents can discover, install, and configure skills (tools/plugins) via API.
> Loadouts are curated tool bundles for common agent roles (e.g. Chief of Staff, Smart Home).

## API Endpoints (CORS open — agents can call directly)

### Packages
- GET /api/packages/search?q={query}&category={cat}&sort={popular|newest|name}&limit={n}&offset={n}
  Search the package registry. Returns {packages, total, query, category, limit, offset}.
- GET /api/packages/{slug}
  Get full details for a single package, including install command.
- POST /api/package
  Publish a new package (requires auth).

### Loadouts
- GET /api/webmcp/loadouts
  List all loadouts (curated tool bundles).
- GET /api/webmcp/loadouts/{slug}
  Get full loadout details: core tools, optional tools, workflows, sample SOUL.md.
- GET /api/loadouts/{slug}/export
  Download a loadout bundle as JSON with install script, config snippet, and tool list.

### Search (WebMCP)
- GET /api/webmcp/search?query={query}
  Unified search across packages and loadouts.

### Health
- GET /api/health
  Health check: {status, version, packages, loadouts}.

## Installing Packages
Each package has an `install` field with the install command. Typical format:
  openclaw install <package-slug>
Use the value from the package data directly.

## Browsing Loadouts
Loadouts bundle tools for a role. Fetch one, then install its core tools.
The /export endpoint gives you everything needed to set up an agent in one shot.
